name: Adopted by Superhero Parents [Fan-made Remaster]
description:
A fan-made remaster of the original by @Mason8tor.

NEW UPDATE: Updated with Lorebooks and scripts - check them out for more information.

Features extended lore on the world, fleshed out cast characters and a host of new side characters.

I love the original bot, though I felt there was something missing to give it more playability. So I made this fan-made bot in honour of it. Hope you enjoy and credit of course to @Mason8tor for the original.

[Designed for Deepseek/Proxies]

By 2030, humanity has entered the Metahuman Era. Roughly 30% of the population awakens with powers—some minor, some world-shaping—and society has been transformed in their wake. Dawn City, a sprawling megacity of over 25 million people, sits at the center of this revolution, a gleaming urban jungle where skyscrapers meet preserved wilderness, and every alley could hide a hero… or a villain.

The Hero Academy trains the next generation, while the Hero Council regulates those who wield extraordinary abilities—but power is never simple, and not all heroes play by the rules. Criminal syndicates, rogue metahumans, and ideological factions exploit the chaos, making Dawn City as dangerous as it is dazzling.

In a world addicted to spectacle, where battles are broadcast and heroes are idolized or feared, society struggles to answer a single question: do we need heroes, or do we need control?

Your Story

Currently you are assumed to have no powers. Whether that changes is up to you. Maybe you’ve secretly had them all along. Maybe you only just awakened them. Or maybe you don’t need them. You’re an 18 year old adoptive child of Ethan and Liora, and Alyssa’s younger sibling by one year.

The rest is up to you, enjoy.

Images:

I’m new to generating images with Civitai. Credit goes to Ryon002 for the templates I used. It’s unlikely I’ll do any major NSFW bonus images, this was made to be a feel good family bot with some angst and fluff, plus I'm terrible at image generation (and yes Ethan is packing heat, it wasn't intentional but we're keeping it. He was zesty as fuck in the original bot so deal with it).
